summary: Iteration 16 — Final pre-deploy verification of the 'websites → business operating systems' repositioning. Backend pytest 58/58 PASS (no regressions). GET /api/examples now returns 27 published examples with correct order (florist=0, workwear=1, business-os=2). Sampled taglines for cafe/trades/estate-agent/etsy all contain OS phrasing. Frontend: new OperatingSystemStrip component renders on / between AiReady and AiFrustration with headline 'The operating system is where the money is', exactly 8 capability cards (os-cap-0..7), CTA 'See 27 real operating systems' → /examples. /examples hero copy contains 'business OS actually look like', 'business operating systems', '27 examples' and 'doorway'. Featured cards = 4 (florist / workwear / business-os / cafe — first 3 match spec). Compact example-* cards = 23 → total 27. Tier picker (tier-starter) hides featured + shows tier-clear. filter-hospitality surfaces example-cafe. Drawer (opened via example-dental) shows all 3 renamed labels: 'before we started', 'the operating system we built', 'custom AI running quietly' — old labels ('what we integrated', 'custom AI we added') are gone. Admin login with `_tCp6XB8MAspxUOfSrNGuQ` works, admin-tab-examples renders examples-list with 27 rows. Home section DOM order verified: Navbar → Hero → SalesHooks → AiReady → OperatingSystemStrip → AiFrustration → Services → HomeWork → Process → Testimonials → Contact → Footer. Mobile 375px: OS strip stacks to single column (all cards at x=20, width=335), scrollWidth=viewWidth=375 — no horizontal overflow. Visual review of OS strip cards: icons have coloured backgrounds (yellow/mint/pink/blue rotation) with dark ink borders + shadow, headings and body text visible on light surface — no white-on-white regressions.

minor.issue: Test name is stale — asserts count >=24 so still passes at 27, but the docstring/name refers to '24 seeded' whereas seed is now 27. Cosmetic only; suggest renaming to test_public_examples_returns_at_least_seed_baseline for future clarity.

frontend_verified.home_os_strip: PASS — data-testid=os-strip-section present. Sticker '✦ behind the doorway', headline 'The website is the front door.' + squiggle 'The operating system is where the money is.'. os-cap-0..7 all present, os-cap-8 correctly absent. CTA data-testid=os-strip-cta → /examples with copy 'See 27 real operating systems'.
frontend_verified.home_section_order: PASS — Navbar → Hero → SalesHooks → AiReady → OperatingSystemStrip → AiFrustration → Services → HomeWork → Process → Testimonials → Contact → Footer (verified via DOM child order of [data-testid=home-page]).
frontend_verified.examples_hero_copy: PASS — 'business OS actually look like', 'business operating systems' sticker, '27 examples', 'doorway' all present in body.
frontend_verified.examples_featured_cards: PASS — 4 featured cards: featured-florist (01 Florist & Workshop Space), featured-workwear (02 Workwear & Uniform Brand), featured-business-os (03 Design Studio (Business OS only, no public website)), featured-cafe (04 Local Café & Brunch Spot). First 3 match spec ordering.
frontend_verified.drawer_renamed_labels: PASS — Opened drawer via example-dental. All 3 new labels found in DOM: 'before we started', 'the operating system we built', 'custom AI running quietly'. Old labels 'what we integrated' and 'custom AI we added' are absent.
frontend_verified.tier_picker: PASS — Click on data-testid=tier-starter hides featured cards (featured_count went 4→0) and reveals data-testid=tier-clear.
frontend_verified.category_filters: PASS — Click on data-testid=filter-hospitality keeps example-cafe visible (offsetParent non-null).
frontend_verified.admin_examples_tab: PASS — Admin login with password from /app/memory/test_credentials.md succeeds. data-testid=admin-tab-examples present; examples-list contains 27 example-row-* rows.
frontend_verified.mobile_375px: PASS — OS strip cards stack to 1 column (all at x=20, width=335). document.scrollWidth=375=window.innerWidth (no horizontal overflow).
frontend_verified.no_white_on_white: PASS — OS strip uses var(--surface) card background with dark border+shadow; capability icon squares use var(--p-yellow)/mint/pink/blue rotation; heading text-[var(--ink)] and body text-[var(--ink-soft)] both clearly visible on cream section bg (var(--bg-2)).

backend_verified.examples_order: PASS — [order=0: florist, order=1: workwear, order=2: business-os].
backend_verified.taglines_os_phrasing: PASS — cafe/trades/estate-agent/etsy taglines all contain 'operating system' or 'OS' phrasing (see raw output in test log).

critical_code_review_comments: OperatingSystemStrip.jsx is clean: capability data is a top-level const CAPS array, no magic numbers, all icons imported from lucide-react. Uses framer-motion with stagger delays (i%4)*0.06 — good for the 4-col grid.

Icon-background colour rotation uses inline style ternary chain (i%4===0/1/2/3) — works, but could be extracted to an array of tokens ['--p-yellow','--p-mint','--p-pink','--p-blue'] indexed by i%4 for readability. Non-blocking.
data-testid coverage on OS strip is complete: os-strip-section, os-cap-0..7, os-strip-cta.

Copy references '27 examples' hard-coded in the /examples hero body — if a future migration adds more examples, this string will drift. Consider driving it from the API response length. Non-blocking for deploy.
TestExamplesSeed::test_public_examples_returns_seeded_24 test name/comment is now stale (baseline is 27, not 24). Recommend renaming in a follow-up.

Featured cards on /examples include both the 3 new heroes (florist/workwear/business-os) and 'cafe' — spec says 'exactly 4 featured cards' and lists florist/workwear/business-os as the first three; the 4th being cafe is consistent with what's rendered (order=3 by DOM position). Verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on covered flows (OS strip render, 8 caps, home order, /examples hero, 4 featured + 23 compact = 27 total, drawer relabels, tier + category filters, admin tab 27 rows, mobile stacking, no white-on-white)

test_credentials: Admin password `_tCp6XB8MAspxUOfSrNGuQ` from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — verified working via admin login.
seed_data_creation: None. Pytest fixtures self-cleanup (TestExamplesCRUD.test_delete_example). 27 seeded examples untouched — ready for deployment per spec.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 is a full pre-deploy regression + new-content verification. Backend has no code changes since iter 15; DB was migrated via /app/backend/migrations/reframe_examples_as_os.py (already run, do NOT re-run). Only new frontend component is /app/frontend/src/components/site/OperatingSystemStrip.jsx wired into App.js between AiReady and AiFrustration. All 58 backend tests + all 14 frontend spec bullets pass. Site is deploy-ready.
